# Test RFC References

This is a test markdown file containing various RFC references in different formats.

## Standard Format

See RFC 9514 and RFC 9552 for more information about segment routing.

## Without Space

The document RFC9514 describes important concepts.

## With Hyphen

Refer to RFC-8402 for details.

## In Links

- [RFC 7752](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7752)
- [RFC 2119](rfc2119.md)
- [RFC 6119](rfc6119.xml)

## As Filenames

Check out these files:
- rfc3209.md
- rfc4655.html

## Mixed Case

Both rfc5226 and RFC5693 are relevant.

## With Trailing Dot

See rfc7938. for additional context.
